# Systems Of Linear Equations

## Tl;DR

Our goal when solving a system of equations is to create an upper-triangular matrix through elimination

$$
a_{11}x_1 + a_{12}x_2 + \dots + a_{1n}x_n = \alpha \\
0 + a_{22}x_2 + \dots + a_{2n} x_n = \beta\\
\dots+a_{nn} = \gamma
$$

Once we have done so, we can then use back substituition in order to solve for each individual unknown.

## Pointers

1. When faced with a vector with a $0$ position at a unknown you would like to remove, swop it with another row or move the columns around.
